results.title: Evanescence Announce Massive 2027 Australia/Nz Tour
results.description: Iconic rock band Evanescence will make a welcome return to Australia and New Zealand in March 2027, for a huge run of headline arena shows. Responsible for one of the world’s most iconic and successful debut albums, Fallen, featuring defining singles like “Bring Me to Life,” “Going Under,” and “My Immortal”, Evanescence will take fans [...] The post Evanescence Announce Massive 2027 Australia/Nz Tour appeared first on Spotlight Report .
